title: calotheca triloba
intro: Calotheca triloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the three-lobed calotheca. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its ability to stimulate digestive enzymes and soothe the gut. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. Calotheca triloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
